hero.claim: I build clean digital products with attention to detail and user experience.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who's behind it
about.paragraph1: I'm a junior developer focused on modern web technologies. I enjoy building things that work — from clean UIs to reliable backends. Every project is a chance to learn something new.
about.paragraph2: I'm currently working on my own projects, growing my skills in React and Spring Boot, and looking for an opportunity to contribute to a real team. I'm detail-oriented, self-driven, and not afraid to ask when I don't know.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's connect
contact.description: Looking for a junior developer, or want to discuss a collaboration? Drop me a message — I'll get back to you.
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
